title: convolvulus sepium var. repens
intro: Convolvulus sepium var. repens, also known as bindweed or creeping convolvulus, is a perennial plant that belongs to the morning glory family (Convolvulaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Convolvulus sepium var. repens include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and alleviate menstrual cramps. Convolvulus sepium var. repens can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a versatile plant for various herbal applications.
